applicability.notes: Load Test per ANSI A92.2-2021 Section 8.2.4.1. Standalone load test to verify structural integrity and load-holding capability. Tests equipment at rated capacity through full range of motion. Required after major structural work, modifications, or as part of periodic inspection. CRITICAL SAFETY TEST - Equipment must pass load test before being returned to service after repairs or structural work.

fields.label: Initial Height (inches from reference point)
fields.help_text: Measure height from fixed reference point at start of 5-minute test

fields.label: Height After 5 Minutes (inches)
fields.help_text: Measure height from same reference point after 5 minutes

fields.label: Total Drift Amount (inches)
fields.help_text: Calculated drift: initial height - height after 5 min (positive number)

fields.label: Manufacturer Drift Limit (inches)
fields.help_text: Enter manufacturer's acceptable drift limit if specified in manual

fields.label: Tester Certification/Qualification
fields.help_text: Load tests should be performed by qualified personnel

fields.label: Equipment Hour Meter Reading
fields.help_text: Record current hour meter reading if equipped

fields.label: Reason for Load Test
fields.help_text: Why is this load test being performed?

fields.label: Capacity chart reviewed to determine rated platform capacity
fields.help_text: Must know exact rated capacity from manufacturer's chart

fields.label: Test area cleared of personnel and obstacles
fields.help_text: Critical safety - no personnel in test area during load test

fields.label: Ground conditions suitable for testing (level, firm surface)
fields.help_text: Unit must be on level, firm ground for valid test

fields.label: All outriggers/stabilizers fully deployed per manufacturer requirements
fields.help_text: Outriggers must be properly deployed for load test

fields.label: Test weights verified to equal or exceed rated capacity
fields.help_text: Test load must be accurately measured and documented

fields.label: Pre-test visual inspection completed (no obvious damage or defects)
fields.help_text: Quick visual check before applying load

fields.label: All controls tested and functional before applying load
fields.help_text: Verify all controls work before starting load test

fields.label: Rated Platform Capacity (lbs)
fields.help_text: From manufacturer's capacity chart

fields.label: Actual Test Load Weight (lbs)
fields.help_text: Must equal or exceed rated capacity

fields.label: Test Load Description
fields.help_text: e.g., water barrels, calibrated weights, sandbags

fields.label: Test load evenly distributed on platform
fields.help_text: Load must be evenly distributed per manufacturer specs

fields.label: Test load secured to prevent shifting
fields.help_text: Critical safety - load must not shift during test

guidance: Raise boom to maximum height with rated load in platform
Boom should raise smoothly without jerking or hesitation
Listen for any unusual noises (grinding, popping, creaking)
Watch for any structural deflection, bending, or twisting
Observe hydraulic system for smooth operation
Monitor for any leaks or unusual cylinder behavior
All movements should be fully controlled

fields.label: Boom raised to maximum height successfully
fields.help_text: Must reach full height with rated load

fields.label: Boom raised smoothly without jerking or hesitation
fields.help_text: Smooth operation indicates proper hydraulic function

fields.label: Maximum Height Achieved (feet)
fields.help_text: Record actual height achieved

fields.label: Any unusual noises during raise?
fields.help_text: Grinding, popping, creaking, or other abnormal sounds

fields.label: Any structural issues observed?
fields.help_text: Excessive deflection, bending, cracking, etc.

fields.label: No defects found during boom raise test

defect.title: Boom raise test defect found under load
defect.description: Defect found during boom raise test with rated capacity load. Equipment must not be operated until issue is resolved.

guidance: Extend boom to maximum reach with rated load
Boom should extend smoothly without binding or jerking
Listen for unusual noises from boom sections
Watch for proper alignment of telescoping sections
Observe for any structural issues or excessive deflection
Check that extension stops properly at full reach

fields.label: Boom extended to maximum reach successfully
fields.help_text: Must reach full extension with rated load

fields.label: Boom extended smoothly without binding
fields.help_text: Smooth extension indicates proper wear pad condition

fields.label: Maximum Reach Achieved (feet)
fields.help_text: Record actual reach achieved

fields.label: Any unusual noises during extension?
fields.help_text: Grinding, scraping, or other abnormal sounds

fields.label: Any structural issues observed?
fields.help_text: Misalignment, excessive deflection, etc.

fields.label: No defects found during boom extension test

defect.title: Boom extension test defect found under load
defect.description: Defect found during boom extension test with rated capacity load. Equipment must not be operated until issue is resolved.

guidance: With boom at maximum height and reach with rated load, rotate through full range
Rotation should be smooth without binding or hesitation
Listen for grinding or unusual noises from turret bearing
Watch for any structural issues during rotation
Observe turret bearing area for smooth operation
Check that rotation is fully controllable in both directions

fields.label: Boom rotated through full range successfully
fields.help_text: Full rotation or manufacturer's specified range

fields.label: Rotation smooth without binding or hesitation
fields.help_text: Smooth rotation indicates good turret bearing condition

fields.label: Total Rotation Tested (degrees)
fields.help_text: Record rotation range tested

fields.label: Any unusual noises during rotation?
fields.help_text: Grinding from turret bearing is critical failure

fields.label: Any structural issues observed?
fields.help_text: Excessive movement, twisting, etc.

fields.label: No defects found during boom rotation test

defect.title: Boom rotation test defect found under load
defect.description: Defect found during boom rotation test with rated capacity load. Equipment must not be operated until issue is resolved.

fields.label: Drift test completed successfully
fields.help_text: Full 5-minute test conducted

fields.label: Description of reference point used for measurements
fields.help_text: Fixed point on ground used to measure platform height

fields.label: Point on platform used for measurement
fields.help_text: Specific point on platform measured to reference

fields.label: Drift Test Notes
fields.help_text: Document measurement method and any observations

steps.title: Boom Lowering and Retraction Test Under Load

guidance: Lower and retract boom smoothly with rated load to stowed position
Lowering should be fully controlled - no free-falling or runaway
Retraction should be smooth without binding
All movements should be fully controllable at all times
Verify controls respond properly during lowering
Check that boom stows properly in travel position

fields.label: Boom lowered smoothly and controllably
fields.help_text: Controlled lowering is critical safety function

fields.label: Boom retracted smoothly without binding
fields.help_text: Smooth retraction indicates proper function

fields.label: Lowering was fully controlled (no free-falling or runaway)
fields.help_text: Free-fall indicates critical hydraulic system failure

fields.label: Boom stowed properly in travel position
fields.help_text: Must stow correctly for safe transport

fields.label: No defects found during lowering/retraction test

defect.title: Boom lowering/retraction test defect found under load
defect.description: Defect found during boom lowering/retraction test. Equipment must not be operated until issue is resolved.

guidance: After completing load test, thoroughly inspect all structural components
Look for any new cracks, deformation, or damage that may have occurred
Pay special attention to high-stress areas: welds, boom sections, mounting points
Check all bolts and pins for tightness
Inspect hydraulic cylinders for leaks or damage
Any damage found during or after load test requires immediate attention
Compare to pre-test condition - document any changes

fields.label: Boom Structure - no new cracks, bends, or deformation
fields.help_text: Critical structural check

fields.label: Welds - no new cracks or defects
fields.help_text: Weld cracks are critical failures

fields.label: Hydraulic Cylinders - no leaks or damage
fields.help_text: Check all cylinders for leaks after load test

fields.label: Pins and Bolts - all secure and undamaged
fields.help_text: Verify all fasteners remained secure during test

fields.label: Platform - no damage to floor, railings, or structure
fields.help_text: Platform must be intact after load test

fields.label: Turret Bearing - no damage or excessive movement
fields.help_text: Check for proper turret bearing function

fields.label: No structural damage found during or after load test
fields.help_text: Any damage = load test failure

defect.title: CRITICAL: Structural damage found during load test
defect.description: Structural damage detected during or after load test. Equipment has FAILED load test and must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE until damage is repaired and unit is retested.

fields.label: Test load equaled or exceeded rated capacity
fields.help_text: Test invalid if load was insufficient

fields.label: All movement tests completed (raise, extend, rotate, lower)
fields.help_text: Full range of motion tested

fields.label: All movements successful with rated load
fields.help_text: Equipment performed all functions under load

fields.label: Drift test within acceptable limits
fields.help_text: Holding valves functioning properly

fields.label: No structural damage observed during or after test
fields.help_text: Critical requirement for passing load test

fields.label: LOAD TEST RESULT: PASS
fields.help_text: Check YES only if ALL requirements met

fields.label: Load Test Summary and Observations
fields.help_text: Comprehensive summary of load test results and any observations

fields.label: Next Load Test Due Date
fields.help_text: If applicable per periodic schedule

rules.title: Test load must equal or exceed rated platform capacity

on_fail.defect_title: Load test weight insufficient - test INVALID
on_fail.defect_description: Test load weight is less than rated platform capacity. Load test is INVALID and must be repeated with adequate test load equal to or exceeding rated capacity.

rules.title: Drift must be within manufacturer specified limits

on_fail.defect_title: Excessive drift detected - holding valve failure
on_fail.defect_description: Drift exceeds manufacturer specifications. Holding valves or cylinder seals may be leaking internally. Unit FAILED load test and must be removed from service, repaired, and retested.

rules.title: Equipment must pass load test before return to service

on_fail.defect_title: CRITICAL: Load test FAILED - equipment OUT OF SERVICE
on_fail.defect_description: Equipment has FAILED load testing per ANSI A92.2-2021 Section 8.2.4.1. Unit must be tagged OUT OF SERVICE until all defects are corrected and load test is successfully repeated.
